catalyst ages.  In May/June of 1998, the reforming catalyst was replacedì
with new catalyst.  This resul

Methanex has implemented good management practices to minimize the quantity ì

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
The number two methanol unit was idled in June 1997 resulted in lower stack ì
emissions.  However, at the same time more product is being stored on site ì
resulting in higher storage and handling losses.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Decreased operation of the Reformer, the largest contributor of NOx emissions, due to a planned maintenance turnaround shutdown at the plant site from August 21 through October 21, 2020. type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased emissions due to the addition of all applicable release points on the Reformer and further monitoring of those points during the annual Fugitive Emissions Leak Detection and Repair (FELDAR) program, from the Distillation Vent due to plant shutdown for turnaround and other outages and increased use of contractor vehicles/equipment and generators during planned maintenance turnaround from August 21 through October 21, 2020.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: VOC emissions from the distillation vents increased as a result of increased methanol conversion efficiency (due to new catalyst in 2020).  The improved efficiency results in a reduction in purge gas from the methanol synthesis loop.  This reduction in purge gas means a reduction in motive gas to draw distillation emissions into the eductor systems. Additional increases due to increased equipment operation hours from the 2020 plant turnaround.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Methanol emissions from the Distillation Vents exhibited a 100% decrease in 2023, due in part to the lack of CO2 injection in 2023 and the aging catalyst; which resulted in more availability of purge gas which acts as motive gas for eductors.  Those eductors collect gas from distillation towers and carries it back to the Reformer as fuel.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Methanol emissions from the Distillation Vents exhibited a 100% decrease in 2023, due in part to the lack of CO2 injection in 2023 and the aging catalyst; which resulted in more availability of purge gas which acts as motive gas for eductors.  Those eductors collect gas from distillation towers and carries it back to the Reformer as fuel.

type.fr: Nature des autres rejets non ponctuels

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Decreased use of generators in 2023 due to fewer plant trips.

type.fr: Nature des autres rejets non ponctuels

comments.comment: On site transportation/trackmobile/emergency generator

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: VOC emissions from the Distillation Vents exhibited a 100% decrease in 2023, due in part to the lack of CO2 injection in 2023 and the aging catalyst; which resulted in more availability of purge gas which acts as motive gas for eductors.  Those eductors collect gas from distillation towers and carries it back to the Reformer as fuel.

type.fr: Nature des autres rejets non ponctuels

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time
